title: Burlington Mesh repeaters
description: Source of truth for the repeaters rendered on burme.sh. Add an entry and it appears on the site on the next deploy.

admins.description: Reusable directory of operators, keyed by id. A repeater's `admin` field references one of these ids, so the same admin can be shared across repeaters.

publicKey.description: Operator's MeshCore public key (hex). When present, the card links to a meshcore:// contact-add for the admin.

status.description: Drives the status badge on the card.

role.description: MeshCore role / blurb. Defaults to "Repeater" if omitted.

admin.description: Id of an entry in the top-level `admins` map (e.g. "a2x").

publicKey.description: Node's MeshCore public key (hex), or null until it is on the air.

added.description: When the node joined, e.g. "2026-06". Used to order newest-first.
